meaning: while doing; concurrently; on the side
example_ja: 本業のかたわら、小説を書いている。
example_en: I write novels on the side while working my main job.

meaning: tend to; prone to; frequently
example_ja: 彼は病気がちだ。
example_en: He is prone to illness.

meaning: on the way; while doing; taking the opportunity
example_ja: 散歩がてら、駅前まで買い物に行った。
example_en: I went shopping downtown, taking the opportunity of a walk.

meaning: unable to do; cannot (polite refusal)
example_ja: お答えしかねます。
example_en: I am unable to answer.

meaning: as soon as; the moment
example_ja: 彼は教室に入るが早いか、泣き出した。
example_en: He burst into tears the moment he entered the classroom.

meaning: nothing but; full of; entirely (positive or neutral)
example_ja: 彼女はいいことずくめだ。
example_en: She has nothing but good things going for her.

meaning: even; not even (emphatic negative)
example_ja: 彼は水すら飲まなかった。
example_en: He didn't even drink water.

meaning: even if; even though (unlikely to help)
example_ja: 今さら謝ったところで、許されないだろう。
example_en: Even if you apologize now, you probably won't be forgiven.

meaning: full of; covered with; lots of (negative nuance)
example_ja: 部屋はゴミだらけだ。
example_en: The room is full of trash.

meaning: once ... it's all over; the moment ...
example_ja: 彼に黙っていると言ったら最後、誰にも言うだろう。
example_en: Once you tell him to keep quiet, it's over — he'll tell everyone.

meaning: after all; in the end; as a result of
example_ja: 長い議論の末、結論が出た。
example_en: After a long discussion, a conclusion was reached.

meaning: ever since; from the time that
example_ja: 日本に来てからというもの、毎日忙しい。
example_en: Ever since I came to Japan, I've been busy every day.

meaning: cannot stop doing; do nothing but
example_ja: 子供の将来を案じてやまない。
example_en: I can't stop worrying about my child's future.

meaning: when it comes to; now that
example_ja: 家族旅行ともなると、準備が大変だ。
example_en: When it comes to a family trip, the preparations are tough.

meaning: combined with; together with
example_ja: 好天に恵まれたことと相まって、大会は大成功だった。
example_en: Combined with the good weather, the event was a great success.

meaning: unique to; only possible for; characteristic of
example_ja: 京都ならではの風景だ。
example_en: This is a scenery unique to Kyoto.

meaning: in order to; for the purpose of (formal)
example_ja: 成功を目指すべく、日夜努力している。
example_en: I strive day and night in order to achieve success.

meaning: will not; let's not; probably not
example_ja: あんな失敗は二度とするまい。
example_en: I will never make such a mistake again.

meaning: if one could; if only; if you think you can
example_ja: できるものなら、やってみろ。
example_en: If you think you can do it, go ahead and try.

meaning: depending on how; depending on the way
example_ja: 使いようによっては、この道具は便利だ。
example_en: Depending on how you use it, this tool is convenient.
